title: Smoky Dum Bitter Delight
description: A dense and bitter Moroccan dish featuring smoked olive oil and dumplings that can help cure hangovers, perfect for a pescatarian-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: 1 red bell pepper, seeded and diced

instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Stir in smoked paprika and red bell pepper, cooking for another 5 minutes.
Add soaked beans and broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and let simmer until the liquid is mostly absorbed (about 20 minutes).
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm as a snack or light meal.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
